title: Broken Leveling
body:
totally balanced leveling system (not)

its just a silly unbalanced leveling mod

---

every ten xp levels, the ten levels disappear and you level up. with each level up you get five stat points which can be put into strength, agility (speed), health, and luck.

![gui displaying level, stat points, strength, agility, health, and luck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00b2e5f02618d061b4e0b959bb82c914c5304114.png)

although i dont even think the luck part works, the mod uses the `/attribute` command in order to work, which is 1.16+
